Resellers

Partner growth surface for resellers and regional rollout teams

The reseller program page explains benefits, onboarding and portal entry without ever prioritizing customer checkout over partner intent.

Request DemoDownload MobileBecome a Reseller

Benefits

Why partners join the program

Use this page to attract partners, collect inquiries and route approved resellers into the correct portal.

Recurring revenue ve komisyon bazli gelir modeli
Sektor odakli satis materyalleri ve kurulum rehberleri
Lisans yenileme ve cihaz aktivasyon gorunurlugu
Egitim, onboarding ve saha destek baglantilari

Journey

Partner onboarding flow

Reseller growth requires a structured path from application to approval to portal usage.

01

Bayi programini inceleyin ve uygunluginizi degerlendirin.

02

Bayi basvuru formunu doldurun ve ticari referanslarinizi iletin.

03

Onaylandiginizda reseller giris bilgileri ve referral kodu olusturulsun.

04

Musteri checkoutlarinizi, lisanslarinizi ve komisyonlarinizi portalden takip edin.

Apply nowReseller login

LoomaPOS

LoomaPOS web katmani urun tanitimi, fiyatlandirma, indirme ve lisans yonetimi icindir. Canli satis operasyonu Desktop ve Mobile uygulamada calisir.
